PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KERRWIN K. CHUN DBA KAK DBA KERWIN CHUN REPRODUCT.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF DEC-06-2006, GRANTED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,954.28 FILED BY KOSMAN SUPPLY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KERRWIN K. CHUN DBA KAK DBA KERWIN CHUN REPRODUCT. JIMENEZ, ALEJANDRINO FRANCISCO ON POINT DOCUMENT OUTSOURCING ANDATHA INTERNATIONAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOSMAN SUPPLY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KERRWIN K. CHUN DBA KAK DBA KERWIN CHUN REPRODUCT. JIMENEZ, ALEJANDRINO FRANCISCO ON POINT DOCUMENT OUTSOURCING ANDATHA INTERNATIONAL INC. $2,904.28 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,954.28, THE COURT DISMISSES DEFENDANT'S ALEJANDRO FRANCISCO JIMENEZ AND ANDATHA INTERNATIONAL, INC. THE COURT DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE DEFENDANT'S KRISTINA LEE AND ON POINT DOCUMENT OUTSOURCING. NOTHING IN THIS JUDGMENT SHALL PRECLUDE DEFENDNAT CHUN FROM CLAIMING INDEMNIFICATION FROM ANY OF THE NAMED DEFENDANTS OR ANY THIRD PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
